indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is a significant obstacle to clear floor space for yoga practice.

indicators.name: nightstands
indicators.rationale: Nightstands are placed close to the bed, limiting the available floor space for yoga.

indicators.name: wardrobe
indicators.rationale: The wardrobe is large and takes up a significant portion of the room, reducing available floor space.

indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor provides a stable surface for yoga mats.

indicators.name: wall-other
indicators.rationale: The presence of windows allows natural light to enter the room.

indicators.name: grass-merged
indicators.rationale: The view of greenery outside the window can create a calming atmosphere.

reasoning_summary: The room is moderately suitable for yoga due to the presence of a wooden floor and natural light, but it is hindered by the bed, nightstands, and wardrobe, which take up significant floor space. The score of 4 reflects the mixed suitability of the space for yoga.
